name: exortek-auth
description: Framework-agnostic authentication toolkit for Node.js — a monorepo of 22 focused packages under the @exortek scope. Built on node:crypto.

scripts.build: yarn workspaces foreach --all --topological --exclude web run build
scripts.build:watch: yarn workspaces foreach --all --parallel --exclude web run build:watch
scripts.typecheck: yarn workspaces foreach --all --exclude web run typecheck
scripts.clean: yarn workspaces foreach --all --exclude web run clean && rm -rf node_modules/.cache
scripts.release: yarn npm login && yarn changeset version && yarn build && yarn workspaces foreach --all --topological --no-private npm publish --tolerate-republish --access public && changeset tag
scripts.verify: yarn typecheck && yarn lint && yarn format:check && yarn test
